module_info.docstring:
Tests for git index.lock retry logic in storage.py.

Tests cover:
- _is_git_index_lock_error() detection function
- _try_clean_stale_git_lock() cleanup function
- GitIndexLockError exception class

methods.name: test_detects_file_exists_error_errno_17
methods.docstring: FileExistsError with errno 17 is a git index lock error.

methods.name: test_ignores_file_exists_error_other_errno
methods.docstring: FileExistsError with other errno is not detected.

methods.name: test_detects_oserror_with_index_lock_message
methods.docstring: OSError with 'index.lock' in message is detected.

methods.name: test_detects_oserror_with_lock_at_message
methods.docstring: OSError with 'lock at' in message is detected.

methods.name: test_detects_oserror_with_cause_chain
methods.docstring: OSError with index lock error in __cause__ is detected.

methods.name: test_ignores_unrelated_oserror
methods.docstring: Unrelated OSError is not detected.

methods.name: test_ignores_non_oserror_exceptions
methods.docstring: Non-OSError exceptions are not detected.

methods.name: test_detects_case_insensitive_message
methods.docstring: Detection is case-insensitive.

methods.name: test_returns_false_if_lock_not_exists
methods.docstring: Returns False when lock file doesn't exist.

methods.name: test_returns_false_if_lock_is_fresh
methods.docstring: Returns False when lock file is newer than max_age.

methods.name: test_removes_stale_lock
methods.docstring: Removes lock file older than max_age.

methods.name: test_handles_missing_git_directory
methods.docstring: Handles case where .git directory doesn't exist.

methods.name: test_handles_permission_error_gracefully
methods.docstring: Handles permission errors when checking lock file.

classes.name: TestGitIndexLockError
classes.docstring: Tests for the GitIndexLockError exception class.

methods.name: test_stores_lock_path
methods.docstring: Exception stores lock_path attribute.

methods.name: test_stores_attempts_count
methods.docstring: Exception stores attempts count.

methods.name: test_inherits_from_exception
methods.docstring: GitIndexLockError is a proper Exception subclass.

methods.name: test_can_be_raised_and_caught
methods.docstring: GitIndexLockError can be raised and caught properly.

classes.name: TestCommitRetryIntegration
classes.docstring: Integration tests for commit retry logic that don't require heavy mocking.

methods.name: test_commit_with_empty_paths_is_noop
methods.docstring: Committing empty path list returns immediately without errors.

methods.name: test_basic_commit_succeeds
methods.docstring: Basic commit with valid file succeeds.

methods.name: test_commit_message_includes_trailers
methods.docstring: Commit message includes agent trailers when present.
